name: retrostrap-mcp
description: retrostrap-mcp, the catalog, conversationally. An MCP server exposing search_catalog, get_snippet, get_theme, and audit_html to coding assistants (docs/09).
comment: @modelcontextprotocol/sdk is the deploy-time transport only (docs/09); the tested core in src/{tools,audit-html,manifest}.js has no runtime dependencies.
